title: harness.toml
description: Per-consumer fs-test-harness configuration. Consumed by both the Mac-side scripts and the Rust runner.

binary.description: Path to consumer's binary on the VM (relative to harness.toml or absolute). Substituted as {binary}.

host.description: Default user@host for SSH; setup-local.sh uses this as a prompt default.

packages.description: winget package IDs installed by setup-windows-vm.ps1.

rust_toolchain.description: rustup channel-target-triple to set as default on the VM, e.g. "stable-aarch64-pc-windows-gnullvm".

env_prefix.description: PowerShell prefix prepended before the cargo invocation, e.g. setting LIBCLANG_PATH.

tools.description: Reference tool paths. Substituted into [ops] / [post_verify] / [mount] templates as {tools.<name>}, e.g. {tools.fsck}.

ops.description: Op-name -> shell command template. Reserved tokens: {binary}, {image}, {drive}, {path}, {from}, {to}, {content}, {extra}, {tools.<name>}.

ready_line.description: Regex matched against mount stdout; mount is considered ready when this matches. Empty => don't wait.

rw_extra.description: Substituted as {extra} when the scenario's mount_args includes --rw. Typical: "--rw".
